title: poa drummondiana
intro: Poa drummondiana, also known as Drummond's blue grass or Drummond's blue grass Poa, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, Poa drummondiana has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Poa drummondiana include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Poa drummondiana can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, for its medicinal use.
